description: DEPRECATED: Use tags_get_summary instead for listing tags. This tool is only needed for paginated access to large tag lists. For 'list my tags' or 'show tags' requests, ALWAYS use tags_get_summary which is more efficient. Only use this tool if you specifically need pagination through a very large tag list.

limit.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default: 50, max: 100). Use pagination for large datasets.

offset.description: Number of tags to skip for pagination (default: 0)

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to retrieve tags for a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested.

tagNames.description: Array of tag names (strings only, not full tag objects). This prevents hallucination by keeping response minimal.

total.description: Total number of tags available across all pages

limit.description: Number of tags returned in this response

hasMore.description: Whether there are more tags to fetch. If true, call again with increased offset.
